title: Plays Too Many Games
summary: Lessons, reflexes, and strategies you’ve learned by playing too many games have applications in the real world, where people who don’t play enough toil and live their dreary lives.
tiers: Tier 3: Sniper’s Aim or Enhanced Speed Edge
Tier 6: Mind Surge or Gaming God
gm_intrusions: Missed attacks strike the wrong target. Equipment breaks. Sometimes people react negatively to someone who has lived most of their life in imaginary game worlds.
text: Lessons, reflexes, and strategies you’ve learned by playing too many games have applications in the real world, where people who don’t play enough toil and live their dreary lives.
